[33mUsage:[0m [32mdemo[0m [flags]

[33mFlags:[0m
  [32m-h[0m, [32m--help[0m            Show context-sensitive help.
      [32m--format[0m="csv"    Output format. Use 'csv' for comma-separated values,
                        'tsv' for tab-separated values, or 'json' for JSON
                        Lines. CSV is the default and is suitable for most
                        spreadsheet tools.
